case_title: TONY KLEIN VS. BROWNSTEIN THOMAS LLP

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $ 27.50 SERVED OCT-31-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BROWNSTEIN THOMAS LLP
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY KLEIN, TONY DBA (ATTORNEY SERVICE OF SAN FRANCISCO)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,145.00 FILED BY KLEIN, TONY DBA (ATTORNEY SERVICE OF SAN FRANCISCO) AS TO DEFENDANT BROWNSTEIN THOMAS LLP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2013 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KLEIN, TONY DBA (ATTORNEY SERVICE OF SAN FRANCISCO)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO JOSHUA S BROWNSTEIN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-02-2013 AT 5:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLEIN, TONY DBA (ATTORNEY SERVICE OF SAN FRANCISCO) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWNSTEIN THOMAS LLP $1,145.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,205.00, DEFENDANT JOSHUA BROWNSTEIN DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BROWNSTEIN THOMAS LLP
